title: lithospermum strigosum
intro: Lithospermum strigosum, also known as prairie blue cue or stiff gentian, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of certain alkaloids and other compounds. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Lithospermum strigosum often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
